word: G5119 - τότε - tóte - tot'-eh - That time

sections.paragraph:
- Original: τότε

- Transliteration: Tote

- Phonetic: tot'-eh

- Definition:

1. then

2. at that time

- Origin: from (the neuter of) G3588 and G3753

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Adverb

- Strong's: From (the neuter of) G3588 and G3753; the when that is at the time that (of the past or future also in consecution): - that time then.
